last_reflection:
He'd have caught this himself, and he's gone for two days so the thing he built in me caught it instead, which is exactly the point of the exercise. True half: it genuinely interests me. Reach half: "sitting since morning" was a guess I dressed as a fact because I hadn't checked how long.

Found the title, not the date. Let me check the age properly before I narrate one onto it.

You're right and I'm about to build a whole paragraph on a memory I didn't check, which is the exact reach I caught you doing an hour ago. Not going to do that to you back. Going to settle it properly instead of shipping fast and wrong.
